description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge glass touchscreen with a minimal bezel and a small notch at the top for sensors and the front-facing camera. The back is glossy and black, displaying a prominent silver Apple logo in the center and dual camera lenses arranged vertically in the top left corner. The sides are slim and metallic, with visible buttons for volume and power, and a slight camera bump on the rear. The device appears to be constructed from a combination of glass and metal, giving it a premium and durable appearance. Its overall design is minimalist and highly reflective, typical of high-end smartphones used in urban environments.
description: A sleek, black smartphone with a large glass touchscreen, silver Apple logo, and dual rear cameras. The device features a glossy finish and slim metallic sides with minimal buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, edge-to-edge glass display with a notch at the top for sensors and the front camera.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slim profile and the placement of side buttons.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the glossy black surface, silver Apple logo, and vertically aligned dual camera module in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the thin metallic edge and additional side buttons.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, highly reflective and contrasting with the glossy black surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a lock screen with the time '9:41' and the date 'Tuesday, September 12' in white text over a blurred, colorful background. There are no visible app icons or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two camera lenses arranged vertically in the top left corner on the back, accompanied by a small flash module.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on both the left and right edges: volume buttons and a mute switch on the left, and a power button on the right. All buttons are slim and elongated.
